title: messages: pad/unpad bucket-based length hiding is correct and should be preserved
description: pad() uses fixed-size buckets (256, 512, 1024, 4096, 65536) with a 4-byte length prefix. This correctly hides payload length to five discrete sizes. The u32 length cast is safe because the max bucket is 65536 and the max plaintext is 65532 < u32::MAX. unpad() validates the declared length against the buffer size before slicing. Both checks are necessary; a future 'simplification' removing the validation in unpad() would be a correctness regression.
